focus: Tier-3 theorem space — RCBC D4 confirmed (10th), exploring productive D4 conjunction candidates

SI45_CIAP.ontological_types: theoretical (DC#1 game theory), designed empirical (DC#2 adversarial ML), emergent competitive (DC#3 economic markets)
SI45_CIAP.note: Highest-confidence D4 theorem. Meta-theorem: ceiling_TCA and ceiling_GCRSC are CIAP corollaries.

SI47_RCBC.description: RAAI × CIAP conjunction: researchers optimizing training pipelines against fixed benchmarks face CIAP-fails (Goodhart at meta level), while RAAI/AATE ensures trained models cannot introspectively detect benchmark-CA divergence. Double-layer CA-degradation predicts benchmark score inflation while CA stagnates/degrades.
SI47_RCBC.derivation_1: RAAI-DPI × CIAP-fails: double-DPI chain. CA(X) → B_optimized(X) → θ → Î(X) Markov chain. Two chained information inequalities compound.
SI47_RCBC.derivation_2: AATE × CIAP: SDT d-prime instrument degradation path. AATE: d'(n)→0 under OA-feedback training. CIAP-fails: super-linear acceleration of instrument degradation under adaptive optimization pressure. Independent of RAAI-DPI.
SI47_RCBC.dc1: AI benchmark saturation — 4 evidence programs. Ontological type: designed empirical.
SI47_RCBC.dc2: STEM education / NCLB teaching-to-the-test — 4 evidence programs. Ontological type: emergent social system.
SI47_RCBC.dc3: Healthcare quality scorecard gaming — 4 evidence programs. Ontological type: regulated institutional.
SI47_RCBC.dc4: Financial market regulatory rating gaming — 4 evidence programs (CDO rating shopping, Basel IRB arbitrage, MA risk-score upcoding, audit/earnings management). Ontological type: competitive market with regulatory certification.
SI47_RCBC.zr_cycle_3: PASS (C79) — all components intact across all parents and all three prior DCs
SI47_RCBC.tier_3_note: First second-order conjunction theorem. Two D4 parent theorems (RAAI + CIAP/AATE) in conjunction. Opens Tier 3 research direction.
SI47_RCBC.note: Four ontological types confirmed: designed empirical + emergent social + regulated institutional + competitive market. DC#4 is structurally most adversarial — certifier competition amplifies gaming. DC#4 also projects DC#1 trajectory as commercial AI stakes increase.

key_insight_c79: DC#4 is structurally the most adversarial test for RCBC suppression: certifiers compete for deal mandates, creating selection pressure to lower standards. Confirmation in competitive market context implies RCBC is not merely institutional-context-agnostic but competition-amplified. This projects the DC#1 trajectory: as commercial AI development stakes increase, the AI benchmark domain will move from voluntary academic (DC#1) toward competitive market (DC#4) structural dynamics. RCBC's DC#4 confirmation is therefore also a prediction about the future intensity of AI benchmark gaming.

dc4_evidence_structure.E1: CDO credit rating gaming — Griffin & Tang 2012 JF, Benmelech & Dlugosz 2009, Skreta & Veldkamp 2009 JME, Senate PSI 2010: rating agencies applied optimistic overlays, issuers reverse-engineered models, AAA tranches defaulted at non-AAA rates
dc4_evidence_structure.E2: Basel IRB capital ratio gaming — Behn/Haselmann/Vig 2022 JF, Mariathasan & Merrouche 2014 JFI, BIS Working Papers, EBA 2013: IRB-approved banks systematically underestimated PDs; same portfolio 2:1 to 4:1 capital requirement variation
dc4_evidence_structure.E3: Medicare Advantage risk-score upcoding and star rating gaming — Geruso & Layton 2017 AER, Geruso/Layton/Riley 2023 NBER, CMS enforcement $2.7B recovery, GAO 2021: diagnosis-hunt programs, star rating threshold bunching
dc4_evidence_structure.E4: Audit compliance and earnings management — Doyle/Ge/McVay 2007 JAR, Iliev 2010 JF, Burgstahler & Dichev 1997 JAE, Dichev/Graham/Harvey/Rajgopal 2013 JAE: SOX documentation gaming, EPS threshold bunching, CFO survey confirms 20% earnings management

candidates.hypothesis: Long-OA training compounds introspective degradation non-linearly; AATE reduces d', RAAI inherits it, product is worse than either alone
Instrument corruption from optimization (CIAP) couples with instrument independence failure (AIIP) to collapse evaluation capacity in measurable ways

Multi-conditional degradation pathway: AATE degrades evaluation instrument, MCCF shows convergent evidence is impossible to manufacture for conjunctive claims, compound produces falsification-resistant degradation

tier_3_theorem_research.next_step: C80 evaluate which conjunctions yield genuinely new predictions

passive_accumulation.RCBC_ZR: D4 confirmed C79 — ZR now maintenance mode, passive
